_doc: Schema 4 (NeedSetPlannerOutput) gap analysis. Compares spec (Data-Flow-Schemas.md lines 420-574) against actual assembleSchema4() output (searchPlanBuilder.js:130-261). Traces every spec field to its data source [S3|LLM|POST] and maps to current implementation status. Updated 2026-03-16.

_plan_alignment._question: Does Schema 4 fulfill its two jobs? (1) Feed NeedSetPlanner.jsx panel 100%, (2) Hand off deterministic search queries to Stage 2.
_plan_alignment.answer: YES — Schema 4 fulfills both panel and handoff jobs. assembleSchema4() (searchPlanBuilder.js:130-261) emits full panel payload with bundles, profile_influence (14 keys), deltas, round/round_mode, and per-bundle fields[]/query_family_mix/reason_active. Handoff delivers deduplicated queries with hashes. Learning writeback uses canonical key names.

schema_4_two_jobs.job_1_panel: COMPLETE. assembleSchema4 emits panel.identity, panel.summary, panel.blockers, panel.round, panel.round_mode, panel.bundles (with key, label, desc, source_target, content_target, search_intent, host_class, query_family_mix, reason_active, queries[{q,family}], fields[{key,state,bucket}]), panel.profile_influence (14 keys), panel.deltas.
schema_4_two_jobs.job_2_handoff: COMPLETE. search_plan_handoff contains queries with q/family/query_hash/group_key/target_fields/preferred_domains/exact_match_required. Hashes deduplicated. Total counted.
schema_4_two_jobs.job_3_learning: COMPLETE. learning_writeback uses canonical key names: query_hashes_generated, queries_generated, families_used, domains_targeted, groups_activated, duplicates_suppressed.

_plan_alignment.what_must_change: Nothing — all gaps resolved as of searchPlanBuilder.js refactor.

_spec_vs_actual_summary.structural_diff: None — actual matches spec section names.

duplicates_suppressed.actual: MATCH — searchPlanBuilder.js:222 emits dupesDropped counter tracked during post-LLM dedup loop

targeted_exceptions.spec: number [LLM] — exceptional queries added outside normal rules

panel._summary: The panel block is the primary consumer contract for NeedSetPlanner.jsx. All sub-objects and scalar fields now emitted.

identity.spec: object [S3] — { state, manufacturer, model, confidence, official_domain, support_domain }

summary.spec: object [S3] — { total, resolved, core_total, core_unresolved, secondary_total, secondary_unresolved, optional_total, optional_unresolved, conflicts }

blockers.spec: object [S3] — { missing, weak, conflict, needs_exact_match, search_exhausted }

_spec_shape.manufacturer_html: number [POST] — count of queries with this family

profile_influence.actual: MATCH — searchPlanBuilder.js:241-249 emits full 14-key object: 7 family counts (initialized to 0, counted from queries), plus duplicates_suppressed, focused_bundles, targeted_exceptions, total_queries, trusted_host_share, docs_manual_share

bundles._spec_shape: Array of { key, label, desc, priority, phase, source_target, content_target, search_intent, host_class, query_family_mix, reason_active, queries[], fields[] }

key.actual: MATCH — searchPlanBuilder.js:149 emits key: gk (from fg.key || fg.group_key)

query_family_mix.actual: MATCH — searchPlanBuilder.js:186 attaches lg?.query_family_mix || null from LLM response groups matched by key

reason_active.spec: string|null [LLM] — why this group is being searched
reason_active.actual: MATCH — searchPlanBuilder.js:187 attaches lg?.reason_active || null from LLM response groups matched by key

queries.actual: MATCH — searchPlanBuilder.js:188 projects bundle.queries to { q: q.q, family: q.family }. Full query objects kept in search_plan_handoff.queries.

fields.spec: Array<{ key, state, bucket }> [POST] — derived from Schema 3 field breakdowns + field_priority_map
fields.actual: MATCH — searchPlanBuilder.js:194-198 derives fields[] from working data: state from satisfied/weak/conflict/missing sets, bucket from requiredLevelToBucket(fpm[fk])

deltas.spec: Array<{ field, from, to }> [POST] — compare previous_round_fields vs current field states
deltas.actual: MATCH — searchPlanBuilder.js:250 calls computeDeltas(ctx) (lines 93-115) which iterates previous_round_fields, compares to current state from focus_groups, emits { field, from, to } for changes. Round 0 returns [].

search_plan_handoff._note: Spec and actual both use 'search_plan_handoff' — naming aligned.

queries.spec: Array<{ q, query_hash, family, group_key, target_fields, preferred_domains, exact_match_required }> [POST]
queries.actual: MATCH — searchPlanBuilder.js:227 emits full query objects

query_hashes_generated.spec: string[] — hashes of all generated queries

queries_generated.spec: string[] — raw query text of all generated queries

_gap_summary._history: 16 gaps (GAP-1 through GAP-12f) identified on 2026-03-15 were all resolved in the searchPlanBuilder.js refactor. assembleSchema4() now reads group_catalog/focus_groups for bundle display fields, derives fields[] per bundle, computes full profile_influence, computes deltas, passes through LLM planner metadata, and uses canonical learning_writeback key names.
